A boy with a giant key teams up with a cartoon duck and dog to fight darkness with the power of friendship.
Driving along neon-lit beaches in the 80s listening to amazing radio stations while building a criminal empire.
A spiky-haired kid accidentally travels through time, meets a robot and a frog, and has to stop a giant space parasite.
A posh British archaeologist explores blocky ruins and fights a T-Rex with dual pistols.
Running along walls at incredible speeds while a giant robotic mech tells me it has calculated a 68% chance of survival.
A framed bodyguard uses dark magic and teleportation to exact revenge, but I keep accidentally alerting the guards.
A cyberpunk agent with sunglasses glued to his face uncovers massive government conspiracies while hacking vending machines.
A plumber rides a hungry green dinosaur who eats everything in sight across a colorful map to save a princess.
I climbed a tower playing cards against horrible monsters, only to get completely destroyed by a giant heart.
Four soldiers fly a helicopter into the mountains, accidentally crash it into a cartel base, and have to shoot their way out.
A hilarious interactive story where a corporate drone and a con artist try to survive a planet of psychos.
Rolling a primate inside a transparent sphere across narrow tracks hovering over the abyss. My hands are sweating.
Driving aggressively through a sunny city to punk music, jumping over traffic just to drop off a customer at Pizza Hut.
I had to frantically shake my controller to brush a character's teeth, and repeatedly yell my son's name in a mall.
A classic RPG where I slowly realized I was actually the evil space lord everyone had been talking about the whole time.
